query:
INSERT INTO message_flags (message_id, reply_later, reply_later_set_at, reply_later_dismissed_at)
               VALUES (?, 1, ?, NULL)
               ON CONFLICT(message_id) DO UPDATE SET
                   reply_later = 1,
                   reply_later_set_at = excluded.reply_later_set_at,
                   reply_later_dismissed_at = NULL
